generated.findings: Stable, mild prominence of the bilateral hilar regions. No focal areas of pulmonary consolidation. No pneumothorax. Stable opacity in the left lung representing a scar.
generated.impression: No acute intrathoracic abnormality. Mild prominence of the bilateral hilar regions, possibly consistent with enlarged pulmonary arteries/pulmonary hypertension. Please correlate clinically.

There is no pneumothorax or large pleural effusion. Cervical vertebral [REDACTED] is partially visible at the top of the radiographs.
ground_truth.impression: 1. Left basilar atelectasis. 2. No focal airspace consolidation.
